title: 1981-04-16_Pat_169.txt
key_claims: In the "true cosmos," space as we know it does not exist; adjacency is based on conceptual/mathematical relation. Forms exist in a binary state of rest/motion. Reality is "space that remembers," analogous to a neural hologram where the whole is contained in every part.
Re-evaluating his novel *VALIS*, Dick realizes his vision was not of the gentle Jesus, but of the fierce, apocalyptic Christ wielding the sword and power of YHWH as eschatological judge.
This apocalyptic Christ is actively destroying the enemy (the Black Iron Prison / Satan) with the "sizzling St. Elmo's fire that kills."
The beam of pink light and the "ajna eye of Shiva" are synonymous: they represent divine Wisdom that simultaneously imparts absolute truth and incinerates wickedness with desiccating heat.
recurring_concepts: **The Third Eye / Ajna Eye**: Represents the dual function of the eschatological judge: total discernment (Wisdom) and absolute destruction (Slaying).
reading_excerpt: In the "true cosmos," space as we know it does not exist; adjacency is based on conceptual/mathematical relation. Forms exist in a binary state of rest/motion. Reality is "space that remembers," analogous to a neural hologram where the whole is contained in every part.
